hooks.command: echo 'CLASI: Call get_se_overview() to load the SE process before doing any work.'

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(master|main)$'; then echo 'CLASI: You committed on master. Call tag_version() to bump the version.'; fi
